experiments.name: Phase 11 ablation (SGD / governor-only / penalty-only / full TCL)
experiments.notes: Match Phase 10 controlled rerun protocol: ResNet-18, Split-CIFAR-10 task_incremental, 40 epochs/task, batch_size 32, 5 seeds. All four conditions on each seed. Output to tar_state/comparisons/ via append-only writer with env snapshot.

purpose: Rerun Phase 11 ablation under the new manifest + append-only + provenance rails. First production test of Phase 6 controlled restart, gated to a single bounded experiment. Replaces the untrusted May 2 phase11_ablation.json.
